acceptance_criteria.text: Finance tab has a clear first-open empty state that explains what to enter first.
proof: First-launch block explains the 5 minimum inputs.

acceptance_criteria.text: User can see a simple mini-wizard path: money, services, staff, workplaces.
proof: Four visible step cards control the input tabs.

acceptance_criteria.text: User can fill a demo salon example without writing data to DB automatically.
proof: Demo button fills local form state only.

acceptance_criteria.text: KPI cards explain what the metric means and what to do when it is weak.
proof: KpiCard supports meaning/action and top KPI cards use it.

acceptance_criteria.text: Top of the finance block shows the first 2-3 priorities instead of only raw metrics.
proof: Priority panel uses starter priorities, recommendations, and missing data.

acceptance_criteria.text: Frontend build, targeted lint, and finance tests pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd frontend && npm exec -- eslint src/components/FinanceFirstStep.tsx src/pages/dashboard/FinancePage.tsx
known_gaps: Browser visual smoke not run in this turn.
Production still needs deploying the fresh frontend build.
